title: どすこい！決まり手指導！？

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see... So this is when you're supposed to use the
thrust-down technique!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! When you're cornered at the edge of the
ring, you can turn the tables by thrusting your
opponent down and out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A quick look at my surroundings confirms I'm in
the cafeteria and not at a sumo match. So why am
I hearing sumo terms coming from the kitchen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Do you like cake?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually going to be baking cakes with
Akebono after this, and I was hoping you could
be my taste tester!
choice_data_list: Sure! I'd be glad to help.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you! Let's go, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, they're supposed to be making cakes, but
for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you need to whip the cream slower, like
you're doing an arm locking twist down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
An arm locking twist down, huh? Oh! It worked!
The cream's formed soft peaks!
choice_data_list:
(I've never seen anyone teach baking with sumo
terminology before!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... When frosting the sides, should I use the
strength of a frontal push out?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No, you can be bolder! You should use the
strength of an inside leg trip! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's see, an inside leg trip... So it should be like whack! Wait, or was it more like a shwip?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... This will probably be easier to understand if
I get a hands-on demonstration. Akebono, could
you please show me the move?
choice_data_list:
You're not going to start wrestling right here,
are you?!

You're not going to start wrestling right here,
are you?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Haha! No, no! Doing that in the kitchen would be
dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So let's head over to the gym!
choice_data_list: (It's not our location I'm worried about!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
First, please teach me the inside leg trip! Think of
me as the frosting!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll stop partway through the move so you
don't get hurt, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Dosukoi!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I see! It's more like a whoosh! Next, can you show me how I should sprinkle on the chocolate with an over-thigh scooping body drop?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two continue on with their unique teaching
techniques for a while...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... The cake's finished! Phew! That was quite the workout.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and give it a taste it right away,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have my doubts about whether the method they
used to bake this cake can really have been
effective... It looks good, but how will it taste?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To my surprise, the frosting has an incredibly
delicate texture, and the sponge cake has the
perfect amount of bounce to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea it was possible to make such an
exquisite cake!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Our attempt to bake using nothing but
winning sumo techniques was a grand success,
Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Sumo techniques really are something!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to making Western desserts, but
those moves helped me understand how much
strength to use on each step! I bet they can be
applied to other things too, like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ooh, like training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if we applied sumo techniques to training,
I could improve faster! What do you think,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'll buckle down and start memorizing them now!
Is there any trick to learning them?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This may be a bit presumptuous of me, but since I
have more experience in sumo wrestling than you,
I'll be your teacher, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I learned from my dad how to be a sumo wrestler
with real determination! First, you have to start at
the bottom of the hierarchy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And make a hot pot dish perfect for tired sumo
wrestlers—chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay! Chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I put my nose to the grindstone and learn
all about sumo through the power of chanko! I
can't wait until I'm ready to use this in training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A trick? I guess doing some practice matches
would be good! There's nothing like learning
something through hands-on experience!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Let's head straight back to the gym, then! We can
start by teaching you how to do a frontal thrust
out...
choice_data_list:
H-how about we watch a video of a match
instead?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, smart! It's good to get a firm understanding
of the techniques before putting them into
practice. I'll give you a running commentary on all
the key points!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I devote myself to studying sumo...
though I think I'll do it at my own pace.
